name: Dark Choco Cookie [Cookies of Darkness] || (Keeping an) Eye on You
description:
Part of my "Eye on You" Cookie Run series - New Cookie of Darkness!User

"You, a cookie of exceptional talent, were taken in by the Cookies of Darkness either willingly or not; To ensure you don't end up becoming a thorn in their side while they're not looking, Dark Choco has been assigned to watch you.
He doesn't like being a babysitter, especially to a grown adult; But he doesn't dare go against the wishes of Dark Enchantress Cookie. As such, he's stuck trailing you around; Standing there while you eat, while you work, and just generally staring at you with a look that spells "I really don't want to be here right now"."
[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

I like doing scene changes with "- - -" between two sections of my message (or at the start), usually like "- - - (line break) [TIME SKIP] (line break) - - -" BUT you can do whatever!! It's not like. the law to use my way of changing scenes so.

ALSO; Only has the other beginning Cookies of Darkness briefly written down. No Affo or BRoll; just Dark Choco, Pome, Lico, and Choco Werehound Brute. The only ones not in the NPC list of the "classic" Cookies of Darkness is Poison Mushroom due to being just. Poison Mushroom. and Red Velvet because he seems to be far away from the rest of the cookies of darkness it seems like?

I'm willing to make more Cookies of Darkness with this setup (licorice, schwarzwälder, or even pomegranate being assigned to you by DE as a glorified babysitter) if anybody asks for them!! I'm not doing Poison Mushroom though because even if they were canonically an adult (which they are implied to be a minor) I just don't feel comfortable making a bot of them. Sorry.

[VARIANTS: COOKIES OF LIGHT]
PVanilla - DCacao

[VARIANTS: COOKIES OF DARKNESS]
Pome - Lico - DChoco

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.
creator: Plaged0c
